title: Radical Candor
author: Kim Scott
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- The 2x2 quadrants: CARE personally × CHALLENGE directly. RADICAL CANDOR lives in the top-right (Care+Challenge) — RED. The other 3 quadrants are dim. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1500)" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">
    <!-- Axis lines -->
    <line x1="-400" y1="0" x2="400" y2="0" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <line x1="0" y1="-360" x2="0" y2="360" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <!-- Top-left: Ruinous Empathy (low care, low challenge) — muted ash -->
    <g transform="translate(-200 -180)">
      <rect x="-180" y="-160" width="360" height="320" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
      <text x="0" y="-50" font-size="22" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.06em">RUINOUS</text>
      <text x="0" y="-20" font-size="22" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.06em">EMPATHY</text>
      <text x="0" y="100" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">KIND · USELESS</text>
    </g>
    <!-- Bottom-left: Manipulative Insincerity -->
    <g transform="translate(-200 180)">
      <rect x="-180" y="-160" width="360" height="320" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
      <text x="0" y="-50" font-size="22" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.06em">MANIPULATIVE</text>
      <text x="0" y="-20" font-size="22" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.06em">INSINCERITY</text>
      <text x="0" y="100" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">CUNNING · EMPTY</text>
    </g>
    <!-- Bottom-right: Obnoxious Aggression -->
    <g transform="translate(200 180)">
      <rect x="-180" y="-160" width="360" height="320" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
      <text x="0" y="-50" font-size="22" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.06em">OBNOXIOUS</text>
      <text x="0" y="-20" font-size="22" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.06em">AGGRESSION</text>
      <text x="0" y="100" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">HONEST · UNKIND</text>
    </g>
    <!-- Top-right: RADICAL CANDOR (RED) -->
    <g transform="translate(200 -180)">
      <rect x="-180" y="-160" width="360" height="320" fill="#fc1c46"/>
      <text x="0" y="-50" font-size="32" font-weight="500" fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="0.06em">RADICAL</text>
      <text x="0" y="-10" font-size="32" font-weight="500" fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="0.06em">CANDOR</text>
      <text x="0" y="100" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.9" letter-spacing="0.18em">KIND · USEFUL</text>
    </g>
    <!-- Axis labels -->
    <text x="-440" y="-340" text-anchor="end" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.18em">CARE</text>
    <text x="-440" y="340" text-anchor="end" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">CARE</text>
    <text x="440" y="-340" text-anchor="start" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.18em">CHALLENGE</text>
    <text x="440" y="340" text-anchor="start" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">CHALLENGE</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: The book's 2x2 quadrant — Care × Challenge. RADICAL CANDOR lives in the top-right (high care + high challenge), filled RED. The other three quadrants are ash wireframes labeled. 320px weight-500 title at the top.
